game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **钢铁战队(R) (Iron Marines):** Players command a small squad of real-time strategy units and powerful hero characters across 21 missions spanning 3 distinct worlds, using tap-to-select and tap-to-move controls on a scrollable map. Core gameplay involves deploying units, which can dynamically switch roles (e.g., from Commando to Sniper) for a resource cost like 50 energy, to counter diverse enemy types and achieve mission objectives. Heroes possess unique abilities activated via on-screen buttons with specific cooldowns (e.g., 30 seconds), while players can also deploy defensive turrets at designated points and call in support abilities like orbital strikes or smart mines with limited uses. Progression is tied to completing missions and 17 "Special Operations," earning "tech points" to unlock and upgrade over 40 unit enhancements, 14 heroes, and 8 special weapons, with difficulty scaling across Casual, Normal, and Veteran modes.
game_info.description: Command your elite squad through tactical real-time strategy combat! Deploy units, upgrade them on the battlefield, and use powerful hero abilities to defeat waves of enemies. Capture strategic points, build defensive turrets, and complete objectives to progress through challenging missions. Manage your energy wisely to deploy units, upgrade them, and activate devastating special abilities. Victory requires strategic positioning, smart unit composition, and timely use of hero powers!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Scroll the map and navigate menus
Space: Deploy selected unit at cursor position / Select units
Z: Activate hero ability (when available)
Shift: Cycle through available unit types
Enter: Start game from menu
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and unit deployment test. Validates that the player can scroll the map, deploy units at different locations, and that units respond correctly to the game environment. Tests basic game mechanics and state transitions.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Scroll through different areas of the map using arrow keys. Deploy multiple units at various positions to verify deployment mechanics. Move cursor around and attempt to interact with game objects. Verify that game state updates correctly with each action.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test succeeds when units are successfully deployed at different map positions, the map scrolls correctly in all directions, and the game state accurately reflects all actions taken. No crashes or unexpected behavior should occur during basic interactions.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test using optimal strategy. Validates that the game can be won by deploying units strategically, using hero abilities effectively, and completing mission objectives. Tests the full gameplay loop from start to victory.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Deploy units at strategic positions near enemy spawn points. Use energy efficiently to maintain a strong defensive line. Activate hero abilities at critical moments to maximize impact. Upgrade units when resources allow. Focus on completing mission objectives while defending key positions.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test succeeds when the player achieves the win condition (defeating all enemy waves or capturing all objectives) and the game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. The strategy should demonstrate effective resource management and tactical decision-making.

TEST_3.test_description: Resource management and upgrade system test. Validates that energy generation, unit upgrades, and special ability costs work correctly. Tests the economic aspect of the strategy gameplay.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Deploy initial units and observe energy generation over time. Attempt to upgrade units when sufficient energy is available. Use special abilities and verify energy costs. Monitor resource levels throughout various game phases.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Test succeeds when energy accumulates correctly, unit upgrades consume the right amount of resources and improve unit stats, and special abilities cost appropriate amounts. Resource constraints should create meaningful strategic decisions.

TEST_4.test_description: Unit interaction and combat test. Validates that units correctly engage enemies, deal damage, take damage, and die when health reaches zero. Tests the core combat mechanics and entity interactions.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Deploy units in direct path of enemy units. Observe combat interactions including attack ranges, damage dealing, and health reduction. Test different unit types against various enemy types to verify combat balance.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Test succeeds when units properly detect and engage enemies within range, damage is applied correctly, units die when health depletes, and combat feels balanced and responsive. Different unit types should show distinct combat characteristics.
